title: Little Garden Appears
description: On pages 1–4, little garden appears as the Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger.
scene: Little Garden Appears. The Straw Hats enter Little Garden, an island frozen in prehistoric time, and split up amid dinosaurs and jungle danger. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What kind of idiotic things are you spouting again!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Shut up! An ungrateful bastard like you needs to get his ass kicked!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Hey! What's wrong!? Who did this to you!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It was one of your crewmates... the green- haired swords- man...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: How dare you cut up every single one of these towns- people,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: After they gave us such a friendly welcome and fed us so much yummy food!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Ah... well I did cut them up but...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Looks like he's a friend of that swordsman.

dialogue.speaker: Miss Valentine
dialogue.text: KYAHAHA. Let's just kill them off already.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: After all, anyone who interferes with our missions must be eliminated...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Are you trying to kill me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Just listen to what I'm saying!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on little garden appears. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
